name: Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp.
summary: PART I Overview. We are a blank check exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on March 21, 2023, for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities.
